debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
induction h₀ with
  | refl => native_decide
  | @step k hk ih =>
    have hk' : 4 ≤ k := hk
    have h_2_le_k : 2 ≤ k := by linarith
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two]
    have h1 : k + 1 ≤ k * k := calc
      k + 1 ≤ 2 * k := by linarith
      _ ≤ k * k := Nat.mul_le_mul_right k h_2_le_k
    have h2 : k + 1 ≤ k ! := calc
      k + 1 ≤ k * k := h1
      _ = k ^ 2 := (pow_two k).symm
      _ ≤ k ! := ih
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) h2
successful_attempts:
induction h₀ with
  | refl => native_decide
  | @step k hk ih =>
    have hk' : 4 ≤ k := hk
    have h_2_le_k : 2 ≤ k := by linarith
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two]
    have h1 : k + 1 ≤ k * k := calc
      k + 1 ≤ 2 * k := by linarith
      _ ≤ k * k := Nat.mul_le_mul_right k h_2_le_k
    have h2 : k + 1 ≤ k ! := calc
      k + 1 ≤ k * k := h1
      _ = k ^ 2 := (pow_two k).symm
      _ ≤ k ! := ih
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) h2
